test.name: Scenario: Create Active Customer Record Via API

kw.name: When a new client payload is requested for "Acme Corp"
kw.source_name: a new client payload is requested for "${customer_name}"

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://postman-echo.com/post path_url=/post headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer sk_enterprise_mock_token_2026', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '63'} body=b'{"name": "Acme Corp", "status": "active", "tier": "enterprise"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Then the operational service confirms record creation
Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.name: Scenario: Retrieve Account Metadata Details Via GET

kw.name: When the system queries for account details using configuration data
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://postman-echo.com/get?id=USR-9982&include_profile=true path_url=/get?id=USR-9982&include_profile=true headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer sk_enterprise_mock_token_2026'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Then the response payload matches the requested query parameters
Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.name: Scenario: Ingest Heavy Structural Record Sets Via Bulk POST

kw.name: When a bulk payload is transmitted containing complete enterprise data
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://postman-echo.com/post path_url=/post headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer sk_enterprise_mock_token_2026', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '387'} body=b'{"company": "Acme Enterprise Solutions", "industry": "Quality Engineering", "active": true, "metadata": {"version": "2.4.1", "environment": "Staging"}, "departments": [{"name": "Information Technology", "headcount": 142, "budget": 1250000.5}, {"name": "Quality Assurance", "headcount": 38, "budget": 450000.0}], "tags": ["automated", "enterprise", "performance-tested", "yaml-injected"]}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Then the data repository verifies structural integrity of the complex data
Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: List Should Contain Value
kw.doc: Fails if the ``value`` is not found from ``list``.

test.name: Scenario: Overwrite Base Data Fields Dynamically and Assert Modifications

kw.name: When a customized payload is constructed and sent with values:
Modify Base Payload With Data Table
Copy Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a copy of the given dictionary.

kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://postman-echo.com/post path_url=/post headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer sk_enterprise_mock_token_2026', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '387'} body=b'{"company": "Acme Enterprise Solutions", "industry": "Quality Engineering", "active": true, "metadata": {"version": "2.4.1", "environment": "Staging"}, "departments": [{"name": "Information Technology", "headcount": 142, "budget": 1250000.5}, {"name": "Quality Assurance", "headcount": 38, "budget": 450000.0}], "tags": ["automated", "enterprise", "performance-tested", "yaml-injected"]}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

test.name: Scenario: Successful Platform Authentication Via UI

kw.name: Given the user navigates to the portal
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\pvmrm\\Documents\\workspace\\RobotFramework_Tutorial\\RobotFramework_API-UI\\browser\\traces\\temp\\0b9a42d7-d781-47c3-9f55-3972055d57f3"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: When the user submits valid enterprise credentials
Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'tomsmith' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Secret
kw.doc: Types the given secret from ``variable_name`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then the application dashboard should load successfully
Verify Flash Message Contains
Get Text
kw.msg: Text: [' You logged into a secure area!\n×']
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.arg: You logged into a secure area!

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
